field_docs.arxiv_id: Base arXiv identifier without version suffix, for example 2501.01234.
field_docs.versioned_id: Identifier including version suffix when available, for example 2501.01234v2.
field_docs.title: Paper title from the Atom entry.
field_docs.summary: Paper abstract from the Atom entry.
field_docs.authors: Ordered list of author display names.
field_docs.affiliations: Unique list of affiliations exposed by arXiv author records, when present.
field_docs.categories: All category identifiers attached to the entry, such as math.QA or math.GT.
field_docs.primary_category: Primary arXiv category identifier, when present.
field_docs.published: Original publication timestamp for the entry in ISO 8601 format.
field_docs.updated: Most recent update timestamp for the retrieved entry in ISO 8601 format.
field_docs.abs_url: Canonical arXiv abstract URL for the entry.
field_docs.pdf_url: Direct arXiv PDF URL when exposed by the feed.
